LanguageData.Doberkin_BallisticShieldz.label: ballistic bouclier
LanguageData.Doberkin_BallisticShieldz.description: An old and basic protective gear which still persists to this day. Now reinforced with a moderate layer of plasteel, the ballistic shield can effectively protect it's user from most of lethal small-arms damage.
LanguageData.Doberkin_BallisticShieldz_AntiPersonel.d: An advanced version of the ballistic shield. This new form of protective equipment can absorb 75 points of damage before the enemy can damage the actual shield itself, which would then allow the shield to repair itself if the wielder avoid combat for a set amout of time.
